flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 17 pp at Western Technology Center vs the 2003–2007 baseline (52.6% vs 69.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Western Technology Center rose 118% between 2006 and 2009 (41.8% → 91.3%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Western Technology Center rose 106% between 2021 and 2024 (46.7% → 96.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Western Technology Center rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 (186 → 206).
